title: Preview Ledger Command Deck
concept: A preview-protecting two-column command deck where the live WordPress shell remains large and persistent while saved objects, launch routes, Site Manager tools, Blueprint gallery, and portability actions write visible mutations into an operations ledger and event stream.
focus: object ledger for temporary, saved, local, PR, GitHub, ZIP, and Blueprint states
event stream for save, rename, delete, import, export, reset, and file edits
light technical console with thin borders and status chips
flows: Delete a saved Playground end to end with warning, cancel option, confirm, progress, final row removal, and active-site fallback when needed
Preview a WordPress PR or Gutenberg PR/branch end to end with route-specific input, validation, loading, resulting preview identity, and save/export availability
Save the active Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct progress, slug/folder consequences, shell title updates, path changes, storage badges, and ledger mutation
Start from Vanilla WordPress, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or ZIP import while keeping the same preview shell and event stream
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint editor, database, logs, Export to GitHub, ZIP download, and database download without hiding the live preview
Browse a representative Blueprint gallery subset honestly labeled against the 43-entry catalog, filter categories, select a Blueprint, copy/download/run it, and see the active preview replaced
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview
Gutenberg PR or branch preview
GitHub import with account connection and token caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with validation and replacement result
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset label
Featured Blueprint shortcuts through representative gallery entries
Save in this browser
Save to a local directory
Save progress state
Saved, local, and temporary Playground differences
Saved Playground open, rename, delete confirmation, and final row removal
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, saved, local, PR preview, GitHub import, ZIP import, and Blueprint result identity states
Settings with WordPress, PHP, language, older versions, network, multisite, destructive reset, and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor with copy link, download bundle, run action, dirty state, and replacement result
Database driver, SQLite path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty and warning states
Export to GitHub with connection and result
Download as .zip with generated result
Transfer and mutation history for imports, exports, saves, downloads, reset, rename, delete, and file edits
